required_rebuild_rules: Author a brand-new full scene from the source image and review findings.
Do not patch or incrementally edit the prior scene geometry.
Use the prior scene only as negative evidence about what looked wrong.
Preserve source language and visible formulas exactly.
Rebuild the whole page even when the visible defect looks local.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Input display flows horizontally to the security module.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Horizontal arrow is present with correct direction and endpoints.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Security module flows horizontally to the complementary masks.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Horizontal arrow is present and reaches the mask cluster.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Complementary masks feed GPU subframe synthesis.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Cross-stage horizontal handoff is present and points into the GPU module.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Optional anti-OCR/inversion connects downward to GPU synthesis without an arrowhead.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Dashed vertical annotation route is present above the GPU module.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Complementary adversarial noise feeds GPU synthesis from below.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Magenta upward route and arrowhead are present.

topology_checklist.source_fact: GPU synthesis emits the sparse displayed subframe sequence.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Horizontal output arrow reaches the first subframe.

topology_checklist.source_fact: A horizontal time arrow runs beneath the subframes.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Time arrow is present below the subframe row and points right.

topology_checklist.source_fact: The subframe sequence reaches a single observer fork.
topology_checklist.replica_status: The main navy lane reaches one fork before branching.

topology_checklist.source_fact: The fork routes upward to the human visual system.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Green orthogonal upper branch reaches the eye node.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Human visual system feeds temporal integration.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Green horizontal arrow connects eye to the integration stack.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Temporal integration produces a readable reconstruction.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Green horizontal arrow reaches the readable output display.

topology_checklist.source_fact: The fork routes downward to camera/machine vision.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Orange-red dashed lower branch reaches the camera node.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Camera/machine vision receives the short-exposure subframe row.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Orange-red horizontal arrow reaches the camera-frame row.

topology_checklist.source_fact: The sampled sequence produces one sparse fragment.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Orange-red horizontal arrow connects the camera row to the fragment.

topology_checklist.source_fact: The sparse fragment reaches an OCR-failure mark.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Orange-red horizontal arrow reaches the OCR-failure mark.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Three stage titles are legible and aligned on one top baseline.
visual_checklist.replica_status: All three stage titles are legible and aligned.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Input, security, mask label, and mask formula remain readable without broken words or overlap.
visual_checklist.replica_status: PRIVATE DATA, security labels, mask label, and mask formula wrap into cramped fragments and collide visually.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Optional tag, GPU title/formula, and noise title/formula are cleanly separated and readable.
visual_checklist.replica_status: GPU formula has irregular gaps; optional tag is cramped; noise text and formula collapse into vertical fragments.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Four subframes, refresh label, time axis, and time label are visually separated.
visual_checklist.replica_status: Subframes and arrows are clear, but the refresh label sits too close to the row and the time label is split.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Human title, integration text, readable display, and output label do not overlap.
visual_checklist.replica_status: Integration wording overlaps the icon/stack area and readable-output text is clipped and stacked into narrow columns.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Camera title, icon, selected exposure window, sampling labels, fragment, and OCR failure remain distinct.
visual_checklist.replica_status: Camera title wraps heavily; CAMERA and OCR are split into vertical letters; sampling and outcome labels overlap the frame row.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Main flow and both branches are axis-aligned and do not cross visible text.
visual_checklist.replica_status: Main flow and branch routes are visually clear and avoid text.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Human and camera outcomes remain distinguishable without relying only on color.
visual_checklist.replica_status: Solid versus dashed routes, panel labels, and outcome wording provide redundant distinction.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: All labels and formulas are readable at the final 7.16-inch width.
visual_checklist.replica_status: Multiple labels are too compressed or broken for final-size publication use.

findings_digest.summary: Stage 1 typography collapses around the input and masks
findings_digest.visible_diff: The source keeps input/security/mask labels readable, while the replica breaks several words into narrow vertical fragments and compresses the mask equation.
findings_digest.source_appearance: Distinct display, security module, mask tiles, centered mask label, and one-line summation formula.
findings_digest.replica_appearance: Broken PRIVATE DATA and security words plus crowded mask label/formula under the tiles.
findings_digest.impact_on_fidelity: The secure-decomposition stage cannot be read reliably at manuscript size.
findings_digest.expected_visible_change: Allocate larger text boxes, use explicit two-line labels, and keep the mask formula on a clean baseline.

findings_digest.summary: GPU and adversarial-noise modules have broken text layout
findings_digest.visible_diff: The GPU formula is fragmented by large inter-character gaps and the noise module collapses its title/formula into a narrow vertical stack.
findings_digest.source_appearance: A clear central GPU module with a single readable equation and a smaller subordinate noise module below.
findings_digest.replica_appearance: Cramped labels and formulas with irregular spacing and overlapping vertical fragments.
findings_digest.impact_on_fidelity: The central mechanism and its secondary-input hierarchy are not publication readable.
findings_digest.expected_visible_change: Use wider module interiors, larger formula boxes, and separate title/formula baselines without overlap.

findings_digest.summary: Human outcome labels overlap and clip
findings_digest.visible_diff: The human branch topology is correct, but integration text overlaps the icons and the readable output label becomes clipped columns.
findings_digest.source_appearance: Eye, temporal integration, readable display, and concise labels are clearly separated.
findings_digest.replica_appearance: Labels sit on top of the integration stack and output display with clipped line endings.
findings_digest.impact_on_fidelity: The upper outcome is visually ambiguous despite correct arrows.
findings_digest.expected_visible_change: Move labels into dedicated rows and widen the readable-output display and caption.

findings_digest.visible_diff: The camera title, CAMERA icon text, sampling label, OCR mark, and unreadable-fragment caption overlap or split vertically.
findings_digest.source_appearance: Camera icon, selected short exposure, sparse fragment, OCR failure, and labels occupy separate visual zones.
findings_digest.replica_appearance: The frame row and outcome labels compete for the same narrow horizontal band.
findings_digest.impact_on_fidelity: The short-exposure mechanism cannot be read cleanly at final size.
findings_digest.expected_visible_change: Simplify the camera title, widen key objects, and place sampling/action/outcome labels on non-overlapping rows.

execution_contract: Use the original image and current replica image as the primary visual evidence.
Use structured review findings to author a brand-new full scene.
Use topology_checklist, visual_checklist, and arrow_plan_repair_targets as explicit regeneration inputs.
For cited arrow ids, repair the mapped scene_edge_ids or motif_bindings rather than relying on broad natural-language arrow notes.
Do not patch or copy prior-scene geometry.
Render the new scene and pass it through the no-op gate before claiming a new round.
